overlap_notes: Primary PROTECT pediatric UC rectal RNA-seq cohort row. GSE109142 is PROTECT baseline/treatment-naive rectal biopsy RNA-seq from 206 new-onset pediatric UC patients plus controls. Same study family as DS039/GSE150961, but public records do not expose a direct subject-ID crosswalk proving exact sample overlap. Count this as the independent PROTECT cohort row.

Same PROTECT pediatric UC inception cohort family as DS038. GSE150961 is a later PROTECT rectal RNA-seq record focused on colectomy risk and one-year follow-up, with 418 rectal biopsies and baseline/follow-up design. Public GEO/PMC records prove same PROTECT family but do not prove a formal component/subset relationship to DS038 or provide a direct DS038-to-DS039 subject crosswalk. Do not count as an independent cohort from DS038; treat as same-family longitudinal/follow-up PROTECT expression resource.
